description_long: This object is a slender, young tree with a thin, grayish trunk and several upward-reaching branches. The branches are sparsely adorned with small, pale pink leaves, giving the tree a delicate and airy appearance. The leaves are distributed mainly at the tips of the branches, allowing much of the branch structure to remain visible. The trunk is straight and tapers slightly as it ascends, with branches diverging at various angles. The overall form is open and sparse, with significant gaps between the leaves and branches. No visible roots are present at the base, and the tree appears to be in an early stage of growth, suitable for urban landscaping or decorative planting.
description: A slender, young tree with a thin gray trunk and sparse, pale pink leaves clustered at the branch tips. The open branching structure gives it a delicate, airy look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main trunk splitting into two primary branches, with sparse pink leaves at the tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angular divergence of branches and the scattered distribution of leaves.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open structure and the minimal leaf coverage, emphasizing the thinness of the trunk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the branching angles and the delicate, sparse leaf clusters.
